[cron:0e8e73f3-a229-41cd-86fd-b82d7056a8b6 GitHub 自动备份推送] 请执行 GitHub 备份推送：

cd C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\workspace
git add .
git commit -m "自动备份推送" || echo "无变更"
git push origin main

如果推送失败，记录错误但不重试，等待下次自动推送。
Current time: Sunday, March 22nd, 2026 — 00:09 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-21 16:09 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

arguments.command: cd C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\workspace; git add .; if (git diff --cached --quiet) { Write-Host "无变更" } else { git commit -m "自动备份推送" }; git push origin main
